ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, technician, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "bg_r" INTEGER /* Red constituent of the background color (8-bit value) */,
  "bg_g" INTEGER /* Green constituent of the background color (8-bit value) */,
  "bg_b" INTEGER /* Blue constituent of the background color (8-bit value) */,
  "adata_src_mode" TEXT /* Audio data source selection mode (0 - external, 1 - internal) */,
  "vdata_src_mode" TEXT /* Video data source selection mode (0 - external, 1 - internal) */,
  "video_pattern_mode" TEXT /* Video pattern generation mode (0 - off, 1 - on) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (active, inactive) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for alert generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configuration_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configuration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., camera, microphone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES register_configuration ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES register_configuration ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES register_configuration ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
